no: Evandra goes after adrian, Isra and xan TN Female Elf Mage
sum: Adds Evandra, a True Neutral elven illusionist NPC to BG2, found in the Planar Sphere, with a friendship path, romance for elven males, and content for both SoA and ToB.

co.no: FIXED: was 'Faldorn position not found within FATESP.DLG'. FaldornBG2 replaces vanilla Faldorn DV with l#fald via clean_ToB_DV. Fix: changed stringPosDV from "Faldorn" to "Eldoth" (stable vanilla DV) in tp2 line 148. Patched in Extracted and game dir. Verify on install.
